name: Freeze
desc: Freeze one enemy piece for 1 turn. Not king.

name: Shield
desc: Protect one of your pieces from capture for 1 turn.

name: Sniper
desc: Remove any piece from the board. Not king.

name: Misfire
desc: Remove one of your own pieces (not king).

name: Promote
desc: Promote one of your pieces. Not king.

name: Demote
desc: Lower one of your pieces to a weaker type. Not king.

name: Promote Him
desc: Promote enemy piece to higher value. Not king.

name: Demote Him
desc: Lower any piece to weaker type. Not king.

name: Teleport
desc: Move one of your pieces to any empty square. Not king.

name: Jump
desc: Move one of your pieces to any empty square in your half. Not king.

name: Double Move (Twin)
desc: Move two different pieces this turn.

name: Double Move (Solo)
desc: Move the same piece twice this turn.

name: Swap Me
desc: Exchange positions of two of your pieces. No check. No king.

name: Swap Us
desc: Swap one of your pieces with one enemy piece. No kings.

name: Swap Him
desc: Swap two enemy pieces. No kings.

name: Borrow
desc: Control one enemy piece for 1 turn. Not king.

name: Mind Control
desc: Permanently steal one enemy piece. Not king.

name: Parasite
desc: Link your piece to enemy piece. If yours dies, theirs dies too.

name: Clone
desc: Copy one of your pieces onto an adjacent empty square. Not king.

name: Lava Ground
desc: Mark one square. Any piece there next turn is destroyed.

name: Fog Village
desc: 3x3 zone: opponent cannot see pieces inside.

name: Invisible
desc: One of your pieces becomes invisible for 1 round.

name: Time Bomb
desc: Attach bomb to your piece. Next round it explodes.

name: Half Fuse
desc: Fuse two adjacent pieces into one. Not king.

name: Full Fusion
desc: Merge two adjacent pieces into one with combined movement. Not king.

name: Fortress
desc: 2x2 zone: enemies cannot enter for 2 turns.

name: Reverse
desc: Undo opponent last move.

name: Undo
desc: Cancel the last card your opponent played.

name: Mirror
desc: Copy opponent last move with your equivalent piece, if legal.

name: Fake Piece
desc: Place an illusion piece.

name: Black Hole
desc: Choose 2 squares. After 2 turns all adjacent pieces explode.

name: Small Sacrifice
desc: Sacrifice pieces totaling 6+ points to draw 2 cards.

name: Big Sacrifice
desc: Sacrifice pieces totaling 14+ points to draw 3 cards.

name: Gambler
desc: 50% steal a card from opponent. 50% give one of yours away.

name: Radar
desc: See all opponent cards for 1 turn.

name: Oracle
desc: Reveal the best move to you.

name: Joker
desc: Choose any card from the full card pool instantly.
